name: La Guajira (Colombia)

colors.symbolism: the salt flats and the peace of its people
the hope and the fertile lands of the Sierra Nevada and the lower Guajira

description: Two equal horizontal stripes, white over green.
history: La Guajira became a department of Colombia in 1965; its bicolour flag of white and green has been in use since then to represent the salt and the green of the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta.
